transcript.clean_text: great day today we had a brave breakaway of 11 riders that went up the road took a long time to establish it because of crosswinds that actually split the peloton in the chase finally it did settle down to the 11 men up the road and with a margin of offering around about the two-minute mark within that group comes for owner of mitchelton scott and michael woods of EF education first possibly the main danger been a big drive was set really the impetus the main impetus coming from Astana well the gap did indeed close and in fact when we got to our final tests with that sort of awful nature that they have here the final climbs which are extremely focused that's when standing was Ruben Guerrero for trick saga Fredo they Portuguese champion and decide to have a go mass of also within this group Michael Matthews that was so brave decided to take it to everybody a quick man if he managed to get over the final test then he may have brought it home but it wasn't to be there was some stronger climbers here and indeed they started to show their hand including mass the leader of the young riders competition well he happens to have a team mate of course in the leader's jersey union our Filipe masses attack allowed our Filipe just a city in ever so slightly not that he stayed there for long in fact he was to draw out response from Roy glitch who finished a second to him yesterday and also joining the fun was at Lander and Gorka is a gira both is a Gary brothers riding better today young most certainly gen Tony Lee had actually guided them for much of the day in fact Quintana forming a secondary chasing group as well but Lander it was that was part of that main push out front some real quality behind including Manny Bookman for Bora hansgrohe his teammate Patrick Conrad was also in the frame and in Factor he came through for a very good finish later on this was the quartet though that was always going to dominate towards the line and so it proved to be and after the final Bend just after a nasty rise it was in fact ala Philippe and Rob which again one and two what can they do to stop these boys is a Garrett and Lander also in the frame and then it was Conrad who bridged over for Bora to finish from those who were trailing but everyone is in the wake of ala Philippe at the moments wake up everybody he is on Form this is how it finished with alle Philippe Rob which rook is a gear Mikkel Lander Patrick Conrad it led them in then Edward Perales of Oscar tail thought you have a good finish today and he did in sixth place ahead of Pella Bilbao disappointing I think for Astana after so much work today at you
